serviceNotes.engine oil: M254 with ISG: 15,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 four-cylinder petrol proxy; W214 has no auto-abc service row yet). Rec 10,000 km severe driving.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz W214 maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Each workshop visit; mild-hybrid recuperation extends pad life but inspections remain required.
serviceNotes.coolant: 30,000 km / 24 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 four-cylinder petrol engine coolant row).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection mild hybrid: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if deposit symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Tier 2 Mercedes E 200 2013 Automatic; W214 M254 — auto-abc has no 2024 W214 row)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W214; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W214
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W214 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 spark row; months not stated)
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 150,000 km to 30,000 km / 24 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection M254 — intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
